tile_summary: Knowledge Work is in a high-intake phase: 13 unprocessed inbox items (agentic engineering, Hermes operations, study craft, second-brain tooling) and 1 workbench item (wiki health, 2 days old). Inbox + workbench scanned live this run. Journal surfaced 13 open questions, the 3 most recent (2026-05-23) circling self-updating-wiki design. AI News digest is live again (5 Grok-sourced items, Textual-TUI / personal-OS themed). Caveat: upstream vault-scan failed 2 consecutive runs, so stale-note detection is currently blind and open-question counts are a 2-day-old snapshot.

sample.question: How does this interact with the public Quartz surface and the desire for a meta-dashboard / Start Here experience?
What does "self-updating" actually mean in practice for this specific voice and Five Dimensions commitment — nightly digests? On-ingest proposals? Weekly contradiction reports?
How much of the lint/audit/cross-ref work should be skill-driven vs. simple scripts vs. occasional Hermes sessions?

items.title: Grok Build agentic coding CLI now available for SuperGrok subscribers
Multi-modal parallel agent orchestration + self-assembling context = personal operating systems are here
RunoGraph: Local-first Textual TUI for coding agent observability and session monitoring
Moon Traveler Terminal: Textual TUI with local LLMs and SQLite memory for agentic procedural worlds
AIRecon: Self-hosted LLM + Docker sandbox + Textual TUI for fully autonomous agentic pentesting
